title: Cannot find file containing module in search dir when module name >127 characters
body:
As shown by the following test case, Verilator 4.016 cannot find the corresponding file for a module whose name is longer than 127 characters when given the search directory with -y:

`test.v`:
```
module test ();
 really_really_really_really_really_really_really_really_really_really_really_really_really_really_really_really_long_module_name inst_e ();
endmodule
```
`really_really_really_really_really_really_really_really_really_really_really_really_really_really_really_really_long_module_name.v`:
```
module really_really_really_really_really_really_really_really_really_really_really_really_really_really_really_really_long_module_name ();
endmodule
```

Result:
> $ verilator --cc -y . test
> %Error: test.v:2: Cannot find file containing module: really_really_really_really_real__Vhsha0o4sqIbRR6PPgOXJ23vHqAM4r0
>         ... Looked in:
>              really_really_really_really_real__Vhsha0o4sqIbRR6PPgOXJ23vHqAM4r0
>              really_really_really_really_real__Vhsha0o4sqIbRR6PPgOXJ23vHqAM4r0.v
>              really_really_really_really_real__Vhsha0o4sqIbRR6PPgOXJ23vHqAM4r0.sv
>              obj_dir/really_really_really_really_real__Vhsha0o4sqIbRR6PPgOXJ23vHqAM4r0
>              obj_dir/really_really_really_really_real__Vhsha0o4sqIbRR6PPgOXJ23vHqAM4r0.v
>              obj_dir/really_really_really_really_real__Vhsha0o4sqIbRR6PPgOXJ23vHqAM4r0.sv
> %Error: Exiting due to 1 error(s)
> %Error: Command Failed /opt/verilator-4.016/bin/verilator_bin --cc -y . test

I suspect this could be related to the fix for [Issue 937](https://github.com/verilator/verilator/issues/937). 

The difference here is that the module with the absurdly long name is not defined in the same file in which it is used.
